title: tragus racemosus var. biflorus
intro: Tragus racemosus var. biflorus, also known as the cluster seed bur, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asclepiadaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Tragus racemosus var. biflorus include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat various ailments, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine.
